rawAssistant: Another weary soul seeking shelter and guidance. I see you're taking a cautious approach to your journey – and rightly so, given Hollowfen's...unsettling history. Be sure to inspect that road thoroughly; those signs could be more than just the usual trappings of Marsh life.
